title: canarium pilicarpum
intro: Canarium pilicarpum, also known as the Black Dammar or Canarium, is a plant species in the family Burseraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Canarium pilicarpum are attributed to its essential oil, which is rich in sesquiterpenes and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and prevent infections. Canarium pilicarpum can be prepared as herbal remedies in various forms, including essential oils, infusions, and capsules, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
